Title: Power BI Expert (m/f/d)
Place: Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portugal
Description:
A NIW é uma empresa de Consultoria que atua em diversas áreas, com destaque para as Tecnologias de Informação. Fazemos parte da Salvador Caetano e a nossa missão é acompanhar, apoiar e assessorar os diversos negócios do Grupo.

Sabias que o setor automóvel é um dos setores de maior inovação e de reinvenção na atualidade? A tecnologia e a digitalização são fatores chave para a sua evolução. Se estás à procura de desafios em diversas áreas, não gostas de rotina e queres evoluir, este é o lugar certo para ti!

Contamos contigo para juntos fazermos avançar o negócio!

Como é Ser Power BI Expert?

O Power BI Expert assume um papel de referência técnica na equipa de dados, liderando o design e implementação de soluções de Business Intelligence de alta complexidade, assegurando qualidade, escalabilidade e alinhamento estratégico com o negócio

- Atuar como referência técnica em Power BI para a equipa e stakeholders
- Definir standards, boas práticas e guidelines de desenvolvimento
- Rever e validar soluções desenvolvidas por perfis menos sénior
- Participar nas decisões de arquitetura de dados
- Desenvolver soluções avançadas de Business Intelligence
- Projetar modelos de dados enterprise (star e snowflake schema, composite models)
- Desenvolver lógica DAX complexa com foco em performance e otimização
- Implementar mecanismos de segurança (Row-Level Security e Object-Level Security)
- Construir relatórios paginados (SSRS / Power BI Report Builder)
- Definir e gerir workspaces e deployment pipelines (Dev, QA, Prod)
- Implementar boas práticas de governance, catalogação e documentação de dados
- Gerir capacidades Premium / Fabric e otimizar custos
- Assegurar conformidade com políticas de segurança e RGPD

O que valorizamos:

- Experiência com Microsoft Fabric (Lakehouse, Dataflow Gen2, Semantic Models)
- Conhecimento de Azure — Synapse, Data Factory, Azure SQL, Purview
- Exposição a práticas de DataOps e versionamento com GitHub
- Boa capacidade de comunicação escrita e oral, adaptando o discurso à audiência
- Orientação para a qualidade — preocupação genuína com a fiabilidade e rastreabilidade dos dados
- Curiosidade analítica — vai além da pergunta inicial e procura o contexto que dá sentido aos números
- Proatividade e pensamento crítico

O que oferecemos:

- Oportunidade de iniciar e desenvolver carreira na área de AI.
- Integração numa equipa experiente com forte cultura de mentoria e aprendizagem
- Participação em projetos tecnológicos que suportam operações críticas do setor automóvel
- Formação contínua e possibilidade de evolução profissional
- Dia extra de férias
- Descontos na compra de viaturas representadas pela Salvador Caetano
- Comparticipação das despesas de saúde extensível ao agregado familiar
- Seguro de vida
- Vantagens na aquisição de produtos/serviços em diversas áreas (lazer, tecnologia, bem-estar, educação…)
- Ambiente colaborativo, estável e orientado a inovação
- Benefícios competitivos e equilíbrio entre vida pessoal e profissional.
- Fundo de pensões

Na Salvador Caetano ajudamos as Pessoas a moverem-se.

Na Salvador Caetano queremos contribuir para um futuro inclusivo e representativo. Acreditamos que a diversidade de talento empodera as nossas equipas, cria ambientes propícios à inovação e contribui para a evolução do negócio. Aqui incentivamos a diferença e incluímo-la. Independentemente da idade, género, etnia ou religião, promovemos a igualdade de oportunidades e garante a integração numa cultura baseada na dignidade e respeito por todas as pessoas.

Title: Data Engineer
HTML:
A Company you will be happy to grow with!

At InnoTech, it’s all about connecting people with business through technology.

We truly care about you, your happiness, and your well-being. We look for passionate people who are eager to learn, evolve, and grow with us - because growth is in our DNA.

This commitment has been consistently recognized: we are proud to be a Great Place to Work for five consecutive years, to be one of the Best IT Companies in Portugal, and to be recognize as a Best Workplace Wellbeing.

We are also proud to hold ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certifications, reinforcing our commitment to information security, quality, and continuous improvement.

For us, sustainability is not just a buzzword. Integrity, social responsibility, and people-first values guide everything we do.

Join our team of 180+ InnoTechers and bring your talent as a Data Engineer.


Your mission will be:

  • Design and develop scalable solutions using low-code and code-based approaches;
  • Ensure software quality through unit testing, CI/CD practices, and software engineering best practices;
  • Work with data processing technologies and collaborate with teams to develop efficient and reliable solutions.


You will need:

  • 1 to 5 years of experience as a Data Engineer (2 slots);
  • Experience with Python, PySpark and SQL;
  • Proven experience in software engineering, unit testing, and CI/CD practices;
  • CPLP nationality or a valid EU work permit;
  • Fluency in Portuguese.


Would be awesome if you have:

  • BSc or MSc in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or related areas;
  • Previous experience in Agile environments.
  • Experience with low-code;
  • Proficiency in English.


What we offer:

  • Health-focused partnerships, including free mental health support;
  • 25 days of vacation, including your birthday, Carnival, and a bridging day between Christmas and New Year;
  • Half a vacation day on your children’s birthday and a school supplies voucher;
  • Petsitting partnerships and a pet bereavement day;
  • Regular team buildings, four annual company parties, game nights, and social events;
  • InnoSports initiatives (football, marathons, and more);
  • Events focused on sustainability and social responsibility actions.


Are you convinced? Come see it for yourself.

Join our Top-Notch Team!

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
Queremos fazer diferente com o essencial.




Apostamos numa estratégia de corporativismo sustentável. Acreditamos que o sucesso se baseia na construção de uma equipa centrada no bem-estar coletivo, no desenvolvimento pessoal e profissional, e assente numa filosofia de trabalho que potencie a gestão saudável das nossas vidas. Work-life balance, beginner’s mind e community involvement são a nossa identidade, os nossos fundamentos e a nossa cultura.




O que precisas para te juntar a nós:




Desenvolvimento Python, com foco em engenharia/processamento de dados
SQL para data querying e validação de dados
Sólida experiência na construção de pipelines ETL/ELT




O que temos para te oferecer:




- Gestão de Talento personalizada. Valorizamos e privilegiamos um acompanhamento próximo e regular, somos uma equipa desde o primeiro dia.




- Pacote de benefícios amplo e flexível. Seguro de saúde, seguro de vida e acidentes pessoais, descontos e benefícios, plano de telecomunicações e muito mais.




- Apostamos na formação e na tua carreira. Formação certificada, plataformas de formação online, centro de exames Pearson VUE... Apostamos em ti!




- Sustentabilidade e envolvimento comunitário. Queremos dar significado ao nosso trabalho e investir num projeto de consultoria inclusivo. Para isso, precisamos da tua ajuda.







Senioridade: Mid/Sen

Idiomas: Português ( obrigatório); Inglês ( preferencial)

Local: Porto







team.it, back to basics!

Juntas-te a nós?










Na Team IT defendemos a igualdade e valorizamos a diversidade.

Criamos um ambiente seguro, diversificado e onde as oportunidades são iguais para todos!

Não discriminamos com base em idade, etnia, orientação sexual, género, deficiência ou qualquer fator que não seja o mérito.

Todas as candidaturas com competências para o cargo são bem-vindas!

Title: AI Trainer - Freelance Data Annotator
Description:
Please submit your resume in English and indicate your level of English.

At Toloka, we connect smart, curious people from around the world with freelance online tasks that train and improve artificial intelligence.

What We Do

The Toloka Annotators connects individuals with Generative AI projects from leading tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the full potential of AI by involving real people from around the world in the development process.

About The Role

Annotation is what helps AI make sense of the world. As an annotator, you may be invited to take part in online projects such as rating AI-generated content, evaluating factual accuracy, or comparing responses - when projects are available.

Responsibilities:


Carefully review provided data (text, images, or videos)
Label or classify content based on project guidelines
Identify and flag factually incorrect, sensitive, inappropriate, or unclear material


Important note: This is project-based work. Tasks are available only when projects are active. You may be invited to one or more projects depending on your profile and current opportunities.

Each project has its own compensation level based on scope and expertise required. On this project, AI trainers earn up to $17 per hour equivalent.

Requirements


Bachelor's degree in any discipline
Minimum 1 year of experience in any professional role
Advanced level of English (C1 or higher), both written and spoken
Logical thinking, fact-checking and reasoning abilities
Strong attention to detail and ability to understand and follow complex instructions
Strong communication skills, including the ability to ask clarifying questions when needed
Genuine interest in technology and artificial intelligence


Benefits

Why this freelance opportunity might be a great fit for you?


Take part in a part-time, remote, freelance project that fits around your primary professional or academic commitments
Work on advanced AI projects and gain valuable experience that enhances your portfolio
Influence how future AI models understand and communicate in your field of expertise

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
Enviar-me por email Guardar

Dellent is a consulting company focused in System Information and Telecommunications. Our goal is to help our candidates and consultants to take a step forward in their careers through projects that meet their needs and expectations.

This project is part of the business investment banking and financial services area, and currently has its technological hub in Porto and is working on the development of innovative solutions and support for all operations related to the business.

We are looking for a Data Engineer to work in this project in Porto (Hybrid).

Requirements


Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, or a related field.
Proven experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role (3+ years).
Proficient in SQL for data extraction and manipulation.
Extract, transform, and load (ETL) data using SQL, Stambia (or other ETL tools) to ensure data quality and integrity.
Experience with Oracle Exadata database is a big plus.
Experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
Proficiency in Power BI for data visualization and reporting is preferred.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a commitment to rigor and participation in team rituals.
Excellent communication skills in French (C1 level required) and English (B2 level required).
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment, with a strong inclination towards technical and functional aspects of data management.


Responsibilities


Analyze and interpret complex data sets to provide actionable insights and support business objectives.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand data requirements and provide analytical support.
Extract, transform, and load (ETL) data using SQL, Stambia, and Oracle Exadata (or other ETL tools) to ensure data quality and integrity.
Assist in the design and implementation of data models and structures to support reporting and analysis.
Participate in continuous improvement initiatives for data processes and analytics methodologies, including the coordination of actions for ongoing operational tasks (RUN).
Handle functional incidents and contribute to technical developments and system enhancements.
Present findings and recommendations to stakeholders in both French and English.


What can you expect from us?


Health insurance;
A personalized training plan, with a budget to spend on the training you find necessary;
Constant feedback so you can grow professionally;
Remote onboarding process;
Team events every semester so you can live new adventures;
Culture of proximity and transparency. Your ideas and needs are heard and valued by us!


Apply

If the above sounds like the kind of job opportunity you would want to get involved with, then please do not hesitate to apply here. You can also explore our content about the job market here.

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
We're Hiring: Data Engineer (Porto - Hybrid)




Are you passionate about building robust data ecosystems and unlocking the power of information?




We are looking for a Data Engineer to join an innovative project in Venda do Pinheiro or Porto, ensuring high-quality data architecture is the foundation of our analytics lifecycle.

This is a key role for a technical expert who thrives in designing data models, creating scalable data pipelines, and implementing robust data frameworks in modern architectures.




The Challenge You will be a core architect of our data ecosystem. Your goal is to move beyond simply moving data; you will be responsible for building reliable data products, optimizing analytics solutions, and enabling data-driven decision-making across the organization.




What you will do:

Data Pipeline Development: Design, test, and implement ETL loading routes in the Snowflake Data Platform to build reliable data products.
Data Modeling & Architecture: Design and expand data models as required to serve as the basis for innovative, user-oriented solutions for data analysis and prediction.
Requirement Analysis: Analyze business requirements and create technical concepts and documentation as a baseline for implementing the associated ETL loading routes.
Quality & Monitoring: Take joint responsibility for monitoring, quality assurance, and error analysis/remediation within our data platform.
Optimization: Constantly pursue optimization potentials for our analytics solutions and proactively aim to implement them.
Collaboration: Coordinate the further development of solutions alongside dedicated departments within our organization.




Profile Requirements:

Education: Degree in (Business) Informatics, Engineering, or a comparable qualification.
Experience: Proven experience working in Data Engineering or comparable roles within data management, Data Warehousing, or Big Data environments.
Technical Stack: Absolute expert in SQL, with strong familiarity in relevant backend analytics technologies (in particular Snowflake and Talend). Proficiency in programming languages such as Python and API interfaces.
Methodologies: Team player with solid experience in agile working methods, ideally Scrum.
Mindset: Enthusiastic about revolutionizing the daily work of users and significantly supporting data-driven decision processes. Experience with Machine Learning and AI is highly valued.
Communication: Confident and business-fluent communication in English. German language skills are an optional bonus that will round off your profile.




Work Setup & Compensation:

Location: Venda do Pinheiro or Porto, Portugal.
Model: Hybrid
Candidates living up to 100km away: 1 to 2 times per week at the office.
Candidates living over 100km away: 1 time per month or 1 time per week at the office.
Type: Full-time (Outsourcing Project).
Salary Range: €30,000 – €42,000 gross/year.

Title: IT Business Analyst (HYBRID @Porto)
HTML:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!


We are looking for an Amazing: Business Analyst

Seniority: 4+ years

Type of position: Hybrid at Porto

The amazing you, will have:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Finance, Business Administration, or related field;
  • 4+ years of experience as IT Business Analyst;
  • Experience with SQL and visualization tools (PowerBI, Tableau, or similar);
  • Experience defining Roadmaps, Solutions Scope, gathering requirements and UAT;
  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret complex data and trends within diverse contexts;
  • Proficiency in gathering and documenting requirements using tools such as JIRA, Confluence, or similar software;
  • Experience working within Agile/Scrum methodologies and familiarity with DevOps practices;
  • Excellent communication, interpersonal, and stakeholder management skills;
  • Availability for a hybrid regime at Porto (Portugal);
  • Fluency in English is mandatory.


To turn yourself from amazing to unique, you´ll have (plus):

  • Related Certifications;
  • Experience in Finance markets, Financial services, or Banking;
  • Fluency in French.


Why should you become part of our family?

  • You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
  • Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
  • Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
  • International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
  • Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
  • In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
  • Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
  • Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
  • Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psicologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!


Who are we?

Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Inovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto, Leiria and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

Title: Reporting and Business Intelligence Senior Specialist (f/m/div)
Description:
#WeAreIn for jobs that impact everyone’s life Behind every success, there is a plan: your strategic thinking, creative skills, and ability to communicate with others will drive innovation and turn ideas into impact. As a Reporting and Business Intelligence Senior Specialist on our Corporate team, you’ll play a vital part in building the frameworks, relationships, and processes that keep Infineon’s Business thriving. Are you in?

Your Role

Key responsibilities in your new role

As a Reporting and BI Senior Specialist, you will provide user support, training, and analysis for IFX reporting solutions, manage change requests, implement new reporting tools, and analyze data to drive business insights and improvements.


Act as a Solution Owner for one or more global reporting solutions, with a focus on providing dedicated support to a specific region, ensuring seamless solution delivery, and driving business value through data-driven insights
Be responsible for the Change Request management including documentation of the corresponding requirements
Design and create standard reports/dashboards for the respective functions and functional areas and develop the reporting solutions with own ideas
Collaborate with functional users to analyze and define reporting requirements
Analyze data and business processes in the respective functional area to identify opportunities for improvement and optimization
Create training concepts and implement of training for the respective reporting solutions
Develop the reporting landscape through the application of Smart Data methods (e.g. Big Data, Artificial Intelligence, Industrial Analytics) with the aim of enabling rapid learning, decision-making and increased productivity


Your Profile

Qualifications And Skills To Help You Succeed

Results-driven professional with strong communication, analytical skills, and a customer-focused mindset. Excels in fast-paced environments, simplifies complex concepts, and drives business success through data insights and independent ownership.


A degree in Business Administration, Economics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field
At least 3 years of experience in a data science role, ideally from a business point of view
Experience in working with data visualization tools such as Tableau, Denodo, or similar alternative tools
Proven experience in delivering training sessions to diverse audiences
Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Fluency in English is mandatory


Please send us your CV in English.

Luis Oliveira, LinkedIn

As a global leader in semiconductor solutions in power systems and IoT, Infineon enables game-changing solutions for green and efficient energy, clean and safe mobility, as well as smart and secure IoT. Title: Data Analyst (French Speaker) | IT CIO Office
Description:
Company Description

Natixis in Portugal is a Centre of Expertise whose mission is to transform traditional banking by developing innovative solutions for the business, operations and work culture of Groupe BPCE worldwide.

As part of Groupe BPCE’s international division, Natixis in Portugal designs and delivers solutions for its two core areas – Corporate & Investment Banking and Asset & Wealth Management – as well as transversal services that support all entities across the Group.

With more than 3,000 employees representing 46 nationalities, the teams work across Information Technology, Banking Support Activities, and Compliance, in an integrated, inclusive, and cross-functional way, supporting all business lines and platforms of the Group.

A disruptive mindset and a culture of proximity and agility identify Natixis in Portugal Team and reflect the company's mission to transform traditional banking at a global scale: a perfect match in the Portuguese dynamics and entrepreneurial ecosystem.

Job Description

The CIO Office is a transversal function supporting IT management across Natixis and Groupe BPCE. Its mission is to define, structure, and sustain governance frameworks, rules, processes, and data foundations that support informed decision‑making at management level.

The CIO Office operates in close connection with the support functions, to promote more efficient channels of communication for management control.

The main areas of scope of the CIO Office are: Project based management, associated with resources, activities and planning control. In addition, it includes control activities associated with KPI implementation and monitoring, financial and Budget control. As well, the CIO Office aims to harmonize the practices and rules, to facilitate a cross-cutting understanding of the challenges and the needs.

Main Tasks And Goals

The Data Analyst will work within the CIO Office in close connection with the CIB Business management IT & Operations unit. In this role lies the responsibility for structuring, validating, analyzing, and transforming data into reliable insights, with a strong focus on IT activity tracking, controls, and governance related reporting, including the supervision of TEMPO usage and CPN1 control mechanisms.

This is a Data Analyst role with a strong governance and controls dimension, not a pure reporting or operational support role. The value of the position lies in data reliability, analytical insight, and long term consistency of governance indicators, serving IT management, and strategic steering.

The Mission Of The Data Analyst Is


Gather data from multiple internal sources (IT activity tracking, TEMPO, financial and operational datasets).
Clean, prepare, and validate datasets, identify missing values, inconsistencies, and quality issues. Analyze datasets to identify trends, patterns, risks, and anomalies relevant to IT activity and controls.
Ensure accuracy, completeness, and reliability of datasets used for governance, controls, and reporting.
Translate analytical findings into business‑level insights suitable for senior IT and management stakeholders.
Support decision‑making through structured analysis and fact‑based recommendations. Ensure consistency over time between data sources, control expectations, and governance frameworks.
Contribute in 2026 to Talent Management System (IT CIB Skills Matrix assessment for Paris & Porto) in the design of our target solution and the preparation of 2026-2027 skills’ collection.
Manage TEMPO spaces for IT CIB projects, support PMs, monitoring TEMPO completion rate and data quality from a controls perspective.
Support PMs on CPN1 Group‑defined controls and indicators: explain expectations and how to comply, monitor adherence and reporting quality, and contribute (when relevant) with proposals for marginal control evolution.
Participate in the improvement and automation of data pipelines and preparation processes where applicable.


Given the significant volume of francophone end users you will engage with, fluency in French, both written and spoken, is a requirement for this role. This proficiency will enable you to effectively address support requests and ensure adherence to established processes.

Qualifications


Minimum of 4 years of experience in a data-driven role.
Proven experience working with governance, controls, or activity tracking topics.
Experience interacting with senior stakeholders and presenting complex data in a clear, business‑oriented manner.
Knowledge of French - B2 mandatory
Knowledge of English - B2 mandatory


Additional Information

Our workplace reflects the vibrant spirit of our locations, with initiatives such as a Green Transportation Budget, electric bikes and a flexible Hybrid Work Policy. We promote wellbeing through the Honolulu Wellness Club, a Prayer Room, a Lactation Room, and themed Villages that inspire creativity and collaboration. Through our ESG and DEI strategies, we are committed to being inclusive, caring, and fair, ensuring every voice is heard and valued.

Our workplace reflects the vibrant spirit of our locations, with initiatives such as a Green Transportation Budget, electric bikes and a flexible Hybrid Work Policy. We promote wellbeing through the Honolulu Wellness Club, a Prayer Room, a Lactation Room, and themed Villages that inspire creativity and collaboration. Through our ESG and DEI strategies, we are committed to being inclusive, caring, and fair, ensuring every voice is heard and valued.

Title: Distributed Cloud | Power BI Specialist
Description:
At Devoteam, we believe that technology with strong human values can actively drive change for the better. Discover how Tech for People unlocks the future, creating a positive impact on the people and the world around us. We are a global leading player in Digital Transformation for leading organisations across EMEA, with a revenue of €1B. We believe in transforming technology to create value for our clients, partners and employees in a world where technology is developed for people. We are proud of the culture we have built together. We are proud of our people at the service of technology. We are proud of our diverse environment. Because we are #TechforPeople. Join our multidisciplinary team of Cloud experts, Designers, Business consultants, Security experts, Engineers, Developers and other extraordinary talents, spread across more than 20 EMEA countries. Become one of our +10.000 tech and business leaders on cloud, data and cyber security. Let’s fuse creativity with technology together and build innovative solutions that actively change things for the better.

Job Description

We are seeking a sharp and insightful Power BI Specialist to drive our Business Intelligence initiatives. You will be instrumental in translating complex business requirements into clear data models and compelling visualizations, ensuring strategic decision-making across the organization.

Key Responsibilities:


Design and develop dynamic dashboards and reports using Power BI to monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and provide actionable business insights.
Gather and translate business requirements into technical specifications for data modeling and reporting solutions.
Develop, optimize, and execute SQL queries to extract, transform, and prepare data for analysis.
Perform data validation and collaborate with stakeholders to ensure data integrity and quality.
Drive the adoption of self-service BI best practices across the business.



Qualifications


3+ years of proven experience as a Data Analyst or BI Developer.
Strong mandatory proficiency in SQL for querying and manipulating data.
Expert hands-on experience with Microsoft Power BI for data modeling (DAX) and visualization.
Proven ability to successfully elicit and document business requirements.
Language Requirement: Professional fluency (B2+) in French is highly valued and may be a mandatory requirement for allocation on specific projects with Francophone clients.



Additional Information

The Devoteam Group works for equal opportunities, promoting its employees based on merit and actively fights against all forms of discrimination. We are convinced that diversity contributes to the creativity, dynamism and excellence of our organization. All of our vacancies are open to people with disabilities.

Title: Junior Data Engineer - Integration
Description:
Worker Type

Employee

Application End Date

06-07-2026

We are using and creating technology to transform operations at sea to enable people and the planet to thrive.

We are open-minded and fearless in our approach to innovation and don't believe in boundaries. We challenge everything and have massive ambitions to drag aging industries into the tech era.

We take safety, equality and education very seriously, and our responsibilities don't stop at our front door. Our business is built on the belief that there's definitely a more environmentally responsible way to operate at sea.

We employ people who share our core values. We expect our people to be courageous, trustworthy, and conscientious, driven by a desire to do the right thing. We strive for excellence, work collaboratively, and are genuinely excited by our work.

We offer opportunities for our people to develop beyond their role and span a multitude of disciplines. These are open to all, regardless of background and experience level. Working with us means being part of a team that is harnessing technology and creativity to disrupt a traditional industry.

We are not your average workplace.

Ocean Infinity is seeking an enthusiastic and motivated Junior Data Engineer - Integration to join our team. The successful candidate will focus on building and automating data pipelines that transform manual workflows into scalable, reliable data solutions. You will work closely with senior team members, data engineers, and product teams to develop data integrations and transformation pipelines that power analytics and operational systems across the company.

What Will You Do


Build and maintain data pipelines that automate manual workflows, transforming raw data into curated, high-quality datasets under guidance from senior team members.
Assist in developing data integrations between the lakehouse and downstream products, analytics tools, or operational systems.
Support the implementation of Bronze → Silver → Gold transformation pipelines using modern orchestration tools.
Contribute to data quality efforts including implementing validation checks, monitoring pipeline health, and basic troubleshooting.
Help develop backend data services and APIs that expose curated datasets to internal consumers and business applications.
Work with Data Engineers, product teams, and business stakeholders to understand data requirements and help implement transformation logic.
Document data pipelines, transformation logic, and data flows, ensuring knowledge sharing across the team.
Learn and apply best practices in data engineering, ETL/ELT patterns, and cloud data technologies.


Who You Are


A degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
0-2 years of experience in Data Engineering, Backend Engineering, Software Development, or related internship/academic project experience.
Solid programming foundation in Python and working knowledge of SQL.
Basic understanding of data pipelines, APIs, or backend services.
Familiarity with version control systems (Git) and collaborative development workflows.
Eagerness to learn about workflow orchestration tools (Airflow, Prefect, Flyte) and ETL/ELT frameworks.
Understanding of fundamental data structures and algorithms.
Good communication skills and willingness to learn from data engineering teams and business stakeholders.
Enthusiasm for working with data, building automated pipelines, and solving practical data transformation problems.


Desirable


Academic or personal projects involving data processing, ETL pipelines, or data transformation.
Exposure to cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP) and data lake architectures.
Familiarity with SQL or NoSQL databases (Postgres, MongoDB, Redis).
Basic understanding of Delta Lake or lakehouse concepts.
Knowledge of data modeling and schema design principles.
Experience with CI/CD concepts or tools.
Basic understanding of containerization concepts (Docker).
Exposure to data quality frameworks or testing approaches.


Salary

Porto - Circa €30000

UK - Based on experience

Salary: The salary varies for this position as we are recruiting in multiple regional locations and job grades. The salary process is based on skills, abilities, and experience required.

What You Can Expect

At Ocean Infinity, we believe in creating equal opportunities for all, celebrating each and everyone’s differences. We are driven by transforming the industry, through our technology, thoughts, behaviours and actions. Being inclusive and respectful to all is fundamental to who we are. It is the right thing to do and enables innovation and creativity to thrive.

There is more work to be done, and we know that we aren’t perfect, but our commitment to these values is unwavering. They are central to our mission and the impact we have on the industry, meaning, we cannot live without them.

Title: Power BI Mid BA (Porto)
Description:
We are looking for a Business Analyst with strong experience in Agile environments, BI tools, and application production monitoring to support business-critical initiatives and ensure smooth collaboration between business and IT teams.

Your Mission

You will act as a key bridge between business stakeholders and technical teams, ensuring that functional, regulatory, and operational needs are properly analyzed, documented, monitored, and delivered.




Key Responsibilities

Facilitate effective communication between business stakeholders and IT teams
Analyze business needs and translate them into clear functional requirements
Support functional and regulatory developments, ensuring alignment with business priorities
Monitor application production and identify anomalies or performance issues
Define and follow corrective actions to improve operational stability
Supervise daily data flow integration and monthly information processing
Conduct business investigations, testing activities, and validation processes
Define business rules and maintain structured functional documentation
Collaborate in Agile ceremonies and contribute to continuous improvement




What We're Looking For

4+ years of experience as a Business Analyst in an Agile environment
Proven experience with Power BI and other BI tools
Strong knowledge of application production monitoring and performance analysis
Experience in business analysis, testing, documentation, and business rules definition
Strong ability to connect business needs with IT delivery
Excellent communication, analytical, and problem-solving skills
Organized, autonomous, and detail-oriented mindset




Nice to Have

Fluency in French
Experience in regulated or data-intensive environments
Knowledge of data flows, reporting processes, and operational controls
Experience working with cross-functional and international teams

Title: Management and Monitoring Analyst
Description:
📢 We’re hiring: Management and Monitoring Analyst







INESC TEC is opening a call for applications for a Management and Monitoring Analyst to join the Research Students Office in Porto, in a hybrid working model.

This is a strategic role for someone who enjoys combining programme management, data analysis, process improvement and stakeholder collaboration.

The selected candidate will contribute to initiatives that support and enrich the research journey of students at INESC TEC, particularly PhD students, by working on areas such as:

🔹 internship, mobility and doctoral scholarship programmes.

🔹 information systems and data monitoring.

🔹 KPIs, analytical reporting and decision-support tools.

🔹 feedback mechanisms and process improvement.

🔹 communication resources and student integration processes.

🔹 collaboration with different institutional services.




We are looking for someone with a background in Management or a related field, strong organisational and analytical skills, experience with tools such as Excel and Power BI, and an interest in research, education, innovation and science.

At INESC TEC, we offer the opportunity to join an institution of excellence in the Portuguese scientific system, in a collaborative, international and innovation-oriented environment, with flexible working arrangements, access to specialised training, health insurance and opportunities for personal and professional growth.

📍 Location: Porto, hybrid.

📄 Reference: AE2026-0159

📅 Application deadline: 25 June 2026

🔗 Apply through the INESC TEC website, in the “Work with us” section: https://www.inesctec.pt/en/opportunities/manage-the-day-to-day-operations-of-the-office-and-support-the-implementation-of-planned-initiatives-AE2026-0159

Join us and help strengthen INESC TEC as an excellent environment for research students to grow, connect and succeed.

Title: Data Engineer (Híbrido @ Porto)
Description:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!




We are looking for an Amazing: DATA ENGINEER

Seniority: Minimum 4-5 years

Type of position: Hybrid (in Porto, Portugal)




The amazing you, will have:

At least 4 years of experience as a Data Engineer (or equivalent).
Hands-on experience with cloud data platforms such as AWS (Redshift, S3), Azure (Synapse, Data Lake), or Google Cloud (BigQuery, GCS).
Strong skills in advanced SQL and data modeling (e.g., Star Schema, Snowflake Schema).
Proficiency in Python for data processing (e.g., pandas, PySpark).
Solid experience with data pipeline orchestration tools like Apache Airflow, dbt, or similar.
Deep understanding of ETL/ELT design and implementation.
Experience with Data Lakes, Data Warehouses, and system integration.
Confident using Git and working with CI/CD workflows.
Fluent English (spoken and written) – essential for collaboration with international teams.
xperience with Spark (PySpark or Scala).
Familiarity with streaming platforms like Kafka, Pub/Sub.
Knowledge of Infrastructure as Code tools (e.g., Terraform).
Experience with data observability and monitoring.




To turn yourself from amazing to unique, you´ll have (plus):

Related certifications.




Why should you become part of our family?

You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psychologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!







Who are we?

Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Innovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto, Leiria and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

Title: Data Engineer
Description:

Title: Sustainability Data Analyst
Description:
Want to know how a leading workplace experience and facility management company is powered by technology?

At ISS Tech Team, we create smarter workplace experiences through technology. Our Global Technology Solutions team builds digital solutions, from sensors and IoT devices to data, analytics and AI-driven capabilities, that support our ISS A/S operations across Cleaning, Workplace, Food and Technical Services.

With tech hubs in Copenhagen, Warsaw, and Porto, and teams collaborating across more than 30 countries, our ISS Tech team develops our digital solutions that have a real impact on both our customers and our people.

Location: Porto, Portugal

Work regime: Hybrid

What Will You Do As Data Analyst


Provide day‑to‑day operational support for quarterly carbon data collection and input validation.
Maintain strong data‑quality control at the input and pre‑processing stage to ensure smooth downstream reporting by the country decarb managers.
Support the implementation of standardised validation checks, anomaly detection, and country follow‑ups.
Assist in preparing clean, validated datasets for further analysis and reporting.
Contribute to audit‑readiness by organising documentation and evidence.


Key Qualifications

Must have:


Master’s Degree in Data or Environmental Science
More than 3 years’ experience in data handling, environmental data, or similar analytical support roles.
Strong skills in Excel, Power BI (basic visuals, data prep), and SQL (simple queries, data extraction).
Experience with data cleaning, validation, and structured data workflows.
English proficiency, both written and spoken.


Nice Have


Familiarity with emissions data or GHG concepts is an advantage but not required.
Comfortable in repetitive, detail-oriented validation work.


Personal Skills


Strong attention to detail and careful execution.
Strong communication and reliability under time pressure.


What ISS Offers You

We focus on creating an environment where you can grow and perform at your best:


Permanent contract.
Private health insurance.
22 days of annual leave + 3 additional company days to recharge.
Flexible working hours and a hybrid model that supports balance and collaboration.
Continuous learning opportunities (technical and behavioural development) to support your growth.
Modern, well-equipped office in the heart of Porto.
Free parking for your convenience.
Access to ISS Tech Communities to connect, learn and share knowledge.
Free access to the company gym to support your wellbeing.
Snacks and drinks available at the office.


Why ISS

At ISS, we are more than just a service provider of cleaning, food, workplace and technical services, we are a partner in our customers’ success. By creating exceptional service moments and transforming workplaces into spaces where employees feel valued, engaged and productive, we enhance productivity and help our customers to attract talent and grow their businesses. This begins with our own people through training, career development, and a supportive culture – empowering them to deliver outstanding service. We know that when our people thrive, they create spaces where our customers’ employees and businesses thrive too.

ISS is a Place to Be You.

Be who you are. Become what you want. Be part of something bigger.

Become more. Become ISS.

ISS seeks to BE a place of belonging and CREATE places where every person is welcomed, embraced, and valued for exactly who they are. Places where people feel safe, respected, represented, and supported as their authentic selves.

Title: Tecnico de Secretaria Comercial (m/f/d)
HTML:
Bem-vindo ao universo Caetano. Somos a organização que reúne as empresas da Salvador Caetano dedicadas à distribuição e reparação automóvel, com forte presença em Portugal e Espanha. Representamos 21 marcas automóveis, com mais de 100 pontos de venda e assistência, mas somos muito mais do que números: criamos experiências de mobilidade que melhoram a vida das pessoas.


A Caetano Reanult é uma das marcas que representamos oficialmente, com equipas especializadas que acompanham cada cliente em todas as etapas,da escolha do carro ao após-venda, garantindo uma experiência simples e confiante. Estamos sempre em movimento à procura de talentos que queiram crescer connosco, aprender rápido e criar soluções com impacto real.

Como é Ser Técnico de Secretaria Comercial?

- É responsável pela encomenda de veículos ao importador e pelos pedidos de matrícula;
- Fatura viaturas a Cliente Final;
- É responsável pelo controlo de documentação de processos de vendas e averbamento;
- Segue Processos de Interligação com Vendas;
- Encerra processos de vendas;
- Realiza o controlo de entregas;
- Faturação de veículos;
- Move-se facilmente em ambientes de ritmo acelerado e com foco no alcance de objetivos;
- Trabalha em equipa com comprometimento na melhoria contínua.


O que oferecemos:

- Formação e desenvolvimento contínuo;
- Integração numa equipa com espírito jovem e colaborativo;
- Possibilidade de trabalhar num contexto dinâmico e numa área de negócio com impacto no desenvolvimento do Grupo.

O que valorizamos:

- Boa capacidade de comunicação e de trabalho em equipa;
- Proatividade, flexibilidade e organização;
- Orientação para os resultados e boa capacidade de tempo e de stress;
- Domínio de Office e sistemas de informação;
- Conhecimento sobre o processo de auditoria da marca;
- Conhecimento do processo de encomenda/matriculas/faturações/bónus.


Na Salvador Caetano ajudamos as Pessoas a moverem-se.

Na Salvador Caetano queremos contribuir para um futuro inclusivo e representativo. Acreditamos que a diversidade de talento empodera as nossas equipas, cria ambientes propícios à inovação e contribui para a evolução do negócio. Aqui incentivamos a diferença e incluímo-la. Independentemente da idade, género, etnia ou religião, promovemos a igualdade de oportunidades e garantimos a integração numa cultura baseada na dignidade e respeito por todas as pessoas.

Title: Data Analyst – Dataiku
Description:
🌍 About Keyrus

Keyrus is a global consulting and technology company focused on architecting intelligence, helping organisations transform data, digital capabilities, and AI into sustainable business value.

Founded in 1996, Keyrus operates in 28+ countries across 5 continents, with more than 3,300 people worldwide. Our strength comes from combining deep expertise in Data & Analytics, AI, Digital, and Management Consulting with a strong understanding of business realities.

Data is never the goal in itself.

We use data to shape understanding, design meaningful experiences, and enable better, real-life decisions.

At Keyrus, we also believe companies have a responsibility beyond performance. Through our Foundation and ESG initiatives, we actively contribute to sustainability, inclusion, and positive societal impact.

#OneTeamOneKeyrus

🎯 The Role

As a Data Analyst, you will work at the intersection of data, technology, and business, helping transform complex datasets into actionable insights that support business, compliance, and operational decision-making.

You will collaborate with multidisciplinary teams in an international environment and contribute to data-driven initiatives that improve reporting, controls, and business performance.

📍 Job location: Porto or Lisbon (Hybrid)

🕒 Contract type: Employee

🗓 Target start date: ASAP

⏰ Working hours: Full-time (40h/week)

💵 Compensation: €35,000 – €45,000/year

Note: All applications (CVs) must be submitted in English.

💥 Your Impact

In This Role, You Will


Gather and analyse business requirements from stakeholders.
Translate business needs into data workflows and reporting solutions.
Develop Dataiku workflows and reconciliation processes.
Create impactful Power BI dashboards and visualizations.
Monitor data quality and perform validation activities.
Generate actionable insights to support decision-making.
Support compliance, controls, and operational reporting initiatives.


⚡ What Makes This Role Challenging


You will work with complex and highly regulated datasets.
Business requirements often evolve and require adaptable solutions.
Data quality and reporting accuracy are critical.
You will collaborate with both business and technical stakeholders.


👤 What We’re Looking For

Must-haves


Bachelor's or Master's Degree in a relevant field.
3+ years of experience in Data Analysis, Business Intelligence, or Analytics.
Dataiku DSS experience.
Strong Power BI skills.
Advanced SQL knowledge.
Experience with data validation, reconciliation, and reporting.
Strong analytical and communication skills.
Fluency in English.
Must be a Portuguese or European citizen, or hold a valid work permit for Portugal.


Nice-to-haves


Python.
Banking or Financial Services experience.
Data Governance exposure.
Regulatory reporting knowledge.
French language skills.
Alteryx or similar workflow automation tools.


💰 How Our Salary Ranges Work

At Keyrus, salary ranges reflect different levels of mastery and impact within the same role — not different job titles.


Bottom of the range You meet the core requirements and will need ramp-up time and support.
Middle of the range You are fully autonomous from Day 1 and deliver consistently.
Top of the range You are a reference for the role, mentor others, and raise the bar for the team.


Final offers are based on experience, autonomy, scope, and market context, and are discussed transparently during the process.

🎁 What We Offer At Keyrus Portugal


Competitive salary aligned with your experience and the data market
Meal allowance: €10.20/day
Flexible benefits plan
Private medical insurance
22 days of annual leave, increasing every 3 years (up to 25 days)
Continuous learning via KLX – Keyrus Learning Experience
A collaborative, international, and human-centred work environment


💙 Why Keyrus?

Joining Keyrus Means Joining


A market leader in Data Intelligence
A company where people, trust, and diversity are core values
An environment that values ownership, flexibility, and innovation
A place where different backgrounds and perspectives are not just welcomed = they are essential


We believe diversity drives better thinking, stronger teams, and better outcomes.

Everyone belongs at Keyrus.

At Keyrus, all stages of our recruitment process are conducted and evaluated by human recruiters and interviewers.

To support accuracy and efficiency, AI may occasionally be used internally by our team exclusively for note-taking purposes during interviews. AI is never used to make hiring decisions or evaluate candidates.

🔒 To ensure fairness, authenticity, and the protection of confidential and proprietary information, the use of AI tools by candidates during the recruitment process is strictly prohibited.

Our commitment to responsible AI practices ensures that hiring decisions are based solely on each candidate’s own skills, experience, judgment, and expertise.

⚠️ Any use of AI assistance during the interview process may result in immediate disqualification from the recruitment process.

♿ Equal Opportunity Statement

We are committed to building an inclusive workplace and encourage applications from all backgrounds, regardless of race, ethnicity, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic.

Title: Business Data Analyst
Description:
We are looking for a Business Intelligence Consultant to join a Corporate IT environment supporting business compliance, regulatory reporting, professional ethics management, and steering activities. The consultant will work on BI solutions used to support regulatory responses, senior management reporting, non-compliance risk identification, and activity supervision.




Work type: Hybrid

Location: Porto




Responsibilities:




Participate in BI projects and evolutionary/corrective maintenance activities.
Support the full project lifecycle, from requirements gathering to production deployment.
Write functional and technical specifications, workshop reports, and test plans.
Work on data and indicator needs for business and regulatory reporting.
Extract, manipulate, analyze, and model data.
Build and maintain PowerBI reports and semantic models.
Collaborate with technical and functional teams across multiple stakeholders.
Structure and facilitate working groups.
Contribute to agile delivery using methodologies such as Kanban and SCRUM.




Requirements:




Around 5 years of experience in Business Intelligence.
Experience in the banking sector is highly valued.
Strong knowledge of SQL Oracle and SQL querying.
Experience with PowerBI, especially semantic model construction.
Knowledge of SSAS and Dataflows.
Ability to work with decision-making systems based on relational databases, including ODS, DWH, and DM layers.
Experience working with ETL processes, ideally Informatica and Python.
Strong ability to extract, manipulate, and analyze data.
Good knowledge of agile methodologies and tools such as Confluence and Jira.
Strong organizational and planning skills.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
Excellent writing skills for reporting, specifications, and documentation.
Ability to work transversally with multiple stakeholders.
English: B2




Optionals:




Knowledge of PowerApps, PowerAutomate
French proficiency.

Title: Data Analyst (f/m/div.)
Description:
The Bosch group has more than 400 000 employees around the world, present in 60 countries, and we are proud to impact people’s lives and to work towards a more sustainable future.



Bosch Service Solutions in Lisbon develops and offers Customer Experience, Mobility, and Monitoring solutions for its clients, and plays a prominent role in providing Engineering and Software Development services in the technology market. Every day, our teams find fast, efficient, and innovative solutions for thousands of people.



At Bosch, we shape the future by inventing high-quality technologies and services that spark enthusiasm and enrich people’s lives. Our promise to our associates is rock-solid: we grow together, we enjoy our work, and we inspire each other. Join in and feel the difference in mindsets, cultures, generations, identities and perspectives. Everyone should bring their authenticity and work together respectfully. Bosch is an employer that values diversity and equal opportunities. We welcome applications from people with disabilities and we can provide reasonable accommodations during the recruitment process and in the performance of professional activity. By including everyone and ensuring equal opportunities we unleash our full potential.





Job Description


Analyze historical data to identify trends, anomalies, and performance drivers
Translate data-driven insights into actionable recommendations to support diagnostics and business decisions for product development
Design and build practical algorithms based on data thresholds and business heuristics to support decision-making
Provide dedicated data-driven support for Engineering Development, including punctual analysis and defining data requirements
Analyze customer ticket data to identify patterns and opportunities for product improvement
Collaborate closely with software engineers, product managers, and other stakeholders to embed data insights into the development lifecycle
Create and present compelling reports and data stories to communicate findings effectively to both technical and non-technical audience
Work closely with software engineers, product managers, and data scientists, data engineers and hardware engineers


Qualifications


Highly proficient in Python and its data analysis libraries, including Pandas, Matplotlib, and PySpark. Basic proficiency in Bash/Linux commands.
Possesses a strong foundation in descriptive analytics, with demonstrated critical thinking and problem-solving capabilities
Capable of working effectively with both structured and unstructured data.
Writes clean, maintainable code and consistently applies version control (Git) as a standard practice within the workflow.
Capable of working effectively with both structured and unstructured data.
Knowledge of dashboard visualization tools, such as Streamlit, would be considered an advantage.
Demonstrates strong data storytelling abilities and delivers clear, compelling reports and presentations tailored to diverse audiences.


Additional Information



Work means:



⚖️ Flexible work conditions



🔀 Hybrid work system



🌐 Exchange with colleagues around the world



🧑‍⚕️ Health insurance and medical office on site



📚 Training opportunities



📈 Opportunities for career progression and continuous professional development



💲 Access to great discounts in partnerships and Bosch products



🏋️ Sports and health related activities



🚉 Great access to public transports



🅿️ Free parking lot



🍽️ Canteen







Success stories don´t just happen. They are made...



Make it happen! We are looking forward to your application!

Title: Analista de Negócio
HTML:
O FC Porto está à procura de um(a) Analista de Negócio com perfil analítico e capacidade para transformar dados e informação de negócio em insights que apoiem a tomada de decisão.


Principais Responsabilidades

  • Recolha, tratamento e análise de dados provenientes de várias fontes;
  • Desenvolvimento de dashboards e relatórios em Power BI;
  • Automatizar processos de análise e reporting;
  • Apoio às equipas internas na interpretação de resultados e indicadores;
  • Identificação de padrões, tendências e oportunidades de melhoria;
  • Contribuir para a tomada de decisão estratégica através de análises claras, rigorosas e orientadas para resultados.


Perfil Pretendido

  • Formação em Estatística, Gestão, Economia, Matemática, Engenharia ou área similar;
  • Domínio de Power BI e capacidade de criação de relatórios interativos;
  • Excel avançado (tabelas dinâmicas, fórmulas complexas, Power Query, etc.);
  • Forte sensibilidade para análise exploratória de dados, assim como atenção ao detalhe;
  • Espírito crítico, curiosidade intelectual e orientação para a melhoria contínua;
  • Boa capacidade de comunicação e gosto pelo trabalho colaborativo em equipa.

Title: Gestor De Pacientes - Porto (M/F/D)
HTML:
• Sobre Nós

A Clínica Médis é uma rede de Clínicas Dentárias de referência composta por 14 clínicas estrategicamente localizadas em Lisboa, Setúbal, Porto e Aveiro.

Com uma equipa de mais de 160 Médicos Dentistas altamente qualificados, a Clínica Médis proporciona todas as áreas de atividade da medicina dentária em todas as suas unidades.

O compromisso com a qualidade é evidenciado pelo seu impressionante NPS Global de 90, refletindo a satisfação dos pacientes.

Com mais de ****** clientes que já escolheram os seus serviços, a Clínica Médis continua a ser uma escolha de confiança para cuidados dentários de excelência.

Queres fazer parte da nossa equipa?

Se tens excelente capacidade de comunicação, forte orientação para a satisfação do cliente, és uma pessoa positiva e orientada para o sucesso, envia-nos a tua candidatura à função de Gestor/a de Pacientes.

Função:Gestor de Pacientes (M/F/D);

Local / Região:Porto;

Horário:Full-Time;

  • O que esperamos de ti:

Acompanhamento personalizado de pacientes e potenciais pacientes;

Gestão das consultas de primeira visita;

Apresentação deplanos de tratamento;

Acompanhamento dos contratos de financiamento;

Gestão de qualquer insatisfação por parte do paciente.

  • Perfil Pretendido

Experiência em atendimento ao público;

Experiência em funções com uma componente comercial;

Experiência em medicina dentária;

Conhecimentos informáticos na ótica do utilizador;

Conhecimentos de inglês.

  • Oferecemos

Remuneração ajustada à experiência;

Possibilidade de progressão de carreira dentro do grupo;

Prémios associados ao desempenho e resultados;

Seguro de saúde, de acordo com a política interna da empresa e em função da antiguidade;

Formação interna contínua e acompanhamento;

Outros benefícios associados à função;

Acesso a parcerias com benefícios e descontos em serviços de saúde nas Clínicas Médis.

  • Horário

Horário de trabalho rotativo, de Segunda a Sexta entre as 8h-21h e Sábados entre as 8h30h-18h30.

Se consideras ter o perfil que procuramos, envia-nos o teu CV atualizado para ******, colocando no assunto "Gestor de Pacientes - Lisboa".

Title: Sustainability Data Analyst
Description:
Want to know how a leading workplace experience and facility management company is powered by technology?

At ISS Tech Team, we create smarter workplace experiences through technology. Our Global Technology Solutions team builds digital solutions, from sensors and IoT devices to data, analytics and AI-driven capabilities, that support our ISS A/S operations across Cleaning, Workplace, Food and Technical Services.

With tech hubs in Copenhagen, Warsaw, and Porto, and teams collaborating across more than 30 countries, our ISS Tech team develops our digital solutions that have a real impact on both our customers and our people.

Location: Porto, Portugal

Work regime: Hybrid

What will you do as Data Analyst:


Provide day‑to‑day operational support for quarterly carbon data collection and input validation.
Maintain strong data‑quality control at the input and pre‑processing stage to ensure smooth downstream reporting by the country decarb managers.
Support the implementation of standardised validation checks, anomaly detection, and country follow‑ups.
Assist in preparing clean, validated datasets for further analysis and reporting.
Contribute to audit‑readiness by organising documentation and evidence.



Key qualifications:

Must have:


Master’s Degree in Data or Environmental Science
More than 3 years’ experience in data handling, environmental data, or similar analytical support roles.
Strong skills in Excel, Power BI (basic visuals, data prep), and SQL (simple queries, data extraction).
Experience with data cleaning, validation, and structured data workflows.
English proficiency, both written and spoken.



Nice have:


Familiarity with emissions data or GHG concepts is an advantage but not required.
Comfortable in repetitive, detail-oriented validation work.



Personal skills:


Strong attention to detail and careful execution.
Strong communication and reliability under time pressure.



What ISS Offers You:

We focus on creating an environment where you can grow and perform at your best:


Permanent contract.
Private health insurance.
22 days of annual leave + 3 additional company days to recharge.
Flexible working hours and a hybrid model that supports balance and collaboration.
Continuous learning opportunities (technical and behavioural development) to support your growth.
Modern, well-equipped office in the heart of Porto.
Free parking for your convenience.
Access to ISS Tech Communities to connect, learn and share knowledge.
Free access to the company gym to support your wellbeing.
Snacks and drinks available at the office.



Why ISS

At ISS, we are more than just a service provider of cleaning, food, workplace and technical services, we are a partner in our customers’ success. By creating exceptional service moments and transforming workplaces into spaces where employees feel valued, engaged and productive, we enhance productivity and help our customers to attract talent and grow their businesses. This begins with our own people through training, career development, and a supportive culture – empowering them to deliver outstanding service. We know that when our people thrive, they create spaces where our customers’ employees and businesses thrive too.

ISS is a Place to Be You.

Be who you are. Become what you want. Be part of something bigger.

Become more. Become ISS.

ISS seeks to BE a place of belonging and CREATE places where every person is welcomed, embraced, and valued for exactly who they are. Places where people feel safe, respected, represented, and supported as their authentic selves.

Acompanhamos o Futuro das Telecomunicações. Abraçamos novos Desafios Tecnológicos. Disponibilizamos Soluções Integradas. Dedicamo-nos e empenhamo-nos em todos os projetos e desafios que nos colocam.   • Gosto por comunicar e ouvir os outros;
  • Atitude positiva e proativa;
  • Organização e vontade de aprender;
  • Português fluente;
  • Experiência anterior em Call Center será valorizada. O que oferecemos:
  • Formação remunerada;
  • Ambiente de trabalho jovem e acolhedor;
  • Possibilidade de crescimento interno;
  • Horário fixo de segunda a sexta-feira, das 15h às 20h. Local: Paranhos, Porto Localização
  • Porto, Portugal

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
At LUXCLUSIF, we are dedicated to redefining the luxury paradigm by offering premium pre-owned fashion to a global audience. As a pioneer in the global luxury resale market, we utilize advanced data-driven solutions to facilitate the buying and selling of high-end pre-owned items. With operations spread across the globe and strategic warehouses in key locations, we ensure a seamless supply of luxury goods. Our comprehensive services cover everything from item curation, quality control, operations, logistics to technology integrations and sales, delivering an unmatched resale experience for brands, retailers, and individual customers alike.

PORTO
Our office is near Porto, in the north of Portugal, and is located in a vibrant business hub. It offers a dynamic and welcoming environment where our employees can connect and network with a large community of tech professionals.

THE ROLE
As a Senior Data Analyst, you will join our Product Analytics team to champion data best practices and strengthen our technical foundations. You will deliver impactful insights regarding our tech products while playing a pivotal role in evolving our self-service data environment. By partnering closely with our Data Engineering team and power users across verticals, you will centralize business logic, optimize our data models, and ensure our analytics products remain performant, scalable, and governed.

What You'll Do


Centralize Business Logic: Identify decentralized logic (such as complex cost calculations currently living inside Power BI semantic models) and push it upstream into centralized, well-documented data models
Empower Self-Service: Provide our vertical power users with a clean, highly performant, and governed data foundation so they can confidently build the reports they need independently
Champion Data Governance: Drive data governance efforts across our growing self-service ecosystem, ensuring data accuracy, consistency, and reliability across the company
Mentor & Elevate: Act as technical anchor for our team, mentoring on SQL optimization, dimensional modeling, and BI best practices
Deliver Product Analytics: Maintain and evolve core company reports while providing deep-dive analytics on our tech products to support strategic business decisions





Who You Are


Experienced Professional: You have 5+ years of experience in Data Analytics, Analytics Engineering, or Business Intelligence, with a strong track record of improving data infrastructure and performance
Tech Savvy: You possess expert-level SQL skills and extensive experience with Power BI (including DAX optimization and semantic models) and cloud data platforms like Azure (particularly Databricks). Ideally, you also bring hands-on experience with dbt and Google BigQuery as we plan to evolve our data stack
Architectural Thinker: You can easily identify bottlenecks in data pipelines or decentralized logic, and you take the initiative to design and implement efficient, scalable solutions
Collaborative Mentor: You are a team player who enjoys collaborating closely with data team members and stakeholders
Effective Communicator: You excel at translating complex technical concepts and governance standards to non-technical stakeholders and power users





Rewards & Benefits


Health insurance for the whole family, flexible working environment and well-being support and tools
Extra days off, sabbatical program and days for you to give back for the community
Training opportunities,
Flexible benefits program





EQUAL OPPORTUNITIES STATEMENT


FARFETCH is an equal opportunities employer ensuring that all applicants are treated equally and fairly throughout our recruitment process. We are determined that no applicant experiences discrimination on the basis of sex, race, ethnicity, religion or belief, disability, age, gender identity, ancestry, sexual orientation, veteran status, marriage and civil partnership, pregnancy and maternity, or any other basis prohibited by applicable law.





SCAM DISCLAIMER


It has come to our attention that there may be fraudulent activities involving individuals or organizations falsely claiming to represent FARFETCH in order to attract candidates to a SCAM. Please be aware that FARFETCH does not conduct recruitment processes through messaging apps or any unofficial communication channels, other than our official careers website. Additionally, FARFETCH will never ask candidates for any form of payment during the recruitment process





We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Procuramos um Técnico de Agendamentos (m/f) para Vila Nova de Gaia. Integrado(a) na equipa de Apoio ao Departamento Operacional, a tua missão será:
  • Atendimento telefónico em contexto de Call Center;
  • Marcação de deslocações para intervenções técnicas no cliente.
  • Localização: Vila Nova de Gaia (Híbrido)
  • Horário: 9h às 18h, de segunda a sábado (Com uma folga rotativa).


Requisitos

  • 12º ano;
  • Boa Capacidade de Comunicação;
  • Capacidade de Organização e planeamento;
  • Orientação para o Cliente Interno e Externo.
  • Conhecimentos na área das energias serão valorizados;
  • Forte sentido de responsabilidade;



Benefícios

  • Contrato de Trabalho de 12 meses
  • Remuneração: 920,00€ + SA (6,00€/dia trabalhado)
  • Acompanhamento personalizado e focado no teu desenvolvimento de carreira;
  • Participação em projetos de elevada visibilidade dentro da organização;
  • Wonder4You – Programa de benefícios exclusivos para colaboradores do Grupo Wondercom.

Title: Assistente Atendimento a Cliente – Part Time Fim de Semana
HTML:
A Synchro, Outsourcing by Egor, está a recrutar Assistente Atendimento a Clientes (Part-Time de fim de semana) para Centro Comercial, na zona de Matosinhos.

FUNÇÃO

  • Atendimento a clientes presencialmente e por telefone, fornecendo informações sobre lojas, serviços e eventos do centro comercial;
  • Registar solicitações e reclamações, organizar materiais informativos e apoiar nas atividades operacionais do balcão do Centro Comercial.

LOCAL E HORÁRIO

  • Sábado e Domingo;
  • Das 16h30 às 23h00;
  • Matosinhos (Senhora da Hora)

REQUISITOS

  • 12.º ano de escolaridade;
  • Gosto pelo atendimento ao cliente;
  • Conhecimentos de inglês;
  • Conhecimentos de Informática na ótica do utilizador.

CONDIÇÕES

  • Vencimento Base 207€/mês + Subsídio de Alimentação 5,50€/dia (cartão);
  • Abono de falhas 10,35€.

Os candidatos interessados devem submeter o CV atualizado.
